skills.name: search-term-analyzer
skills.description: Analyzes Google Ads search terms. Finds wasted spend, generates negative keyword lists, and surfaces promotion candidates.

skills.name: csv-analyzer
skills.description: Analyzes any CSV and generates an interactive HTML report with charts and insights. Auto-detects data types.

skills.name: post-meeting
skills.description: Processes meeting transcripts into action items, decisions, and a follow-up email draft.

skills.name: inboxy
skills.description: Triages messages and emails by priority. Produces an interactive dashboard with draft replies.

skills.name: followups
skills.description: Scans contacts for overdue relationships, drafts check-in messages, and builds an outreach calendar.

skills.name: draft-post
skills.description: Creates polished LinkedIn and X/Twitter posts from rough input with platform-specific formatting.

skills.name: post-evaluator
skills.description: Scores social media posts across 5 lenses with improvement suggestions.

skills.name: competitor-scraper
skills.description: Fetches competitor Google Ads via DataForSEO API and generates a competitive intelligence report.
